case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JULIO CESAR BORGES DZUL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,414.26 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES DZUL, JULIO CESAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED MAY-23-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES DZUL, JULIO CESAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES DZUL, JULIO CESAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORGES DZUL, JULIO CESAR $1,414.26 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,519.26 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
